goal: 刷新外部提交包到最新 main 状态

summary.title: 刷新外部提交状态真相
summary.what: 修正 release:cutover:status 的 releaseDecision.currentAcceptedMainCommit 来源，使它在运行时使用 live git HEAD，同时保留 release packet 中的 recordedMainCommit 作为静态 checkpoint；同步外部提交包到 PR #15 / 033570b 的 prepare 结果，并把示例 --source-pr 改成占位符，避免后续复制旧 PR URL。
summary.why: cutover delivery 已进入外部提交阶段，状态命令和 handoff 文档必须反映当前 main 与实际 upload bundle；否则 agent 容易继续为了过期 commit 字段反复拆小修复，影响旧产品替换主线推进。
summary.user_goal: 刷新外部提交包到最新 main 状态

decisions.chose: 由 release:cutover:status 在运行时从 git HEAD 填充 currentAcceptedMainCommit，同时暴露 recordedMainCommit 保留文档 checkpoint
decisions.rationale: 静态文档中的 commit 会在 docs-only merge 后自然过期；live gate 应以当前 checkout/upstream 状态为准。
rejected: 继续每次只改文档里的 current accepted main commit

decisions.chose: 把 --source-pr 示例改成占位符，并说明 generated manifest 会记录 live git HEAD
decisions.rationale: 避免后续 handoff 复制 PR #13 这类旧 URL，保持外部提交记录与实际运行时来源一致。

review_notes: 验证已跑 bun run test -- apps/mv3-shell/test/release-cutover-status.spec.ts，3 tests passed。
验证已跑 focused biome check、git diff --check、bun run check；仓库 gate 39 files / 625 tests passed。
本次没有新增 deferred product breadth，范围只限 cutover delivery truth repair。

architectural_claims: cutover delivery status should prefer live runtime/git truth over stale static packet fields
behavioral_changes: release:cutover:status now reports releaseDecision.currentAcceptedMainCommit from live git HEAD
release:cutover:status now includes releaseDecision.recordedMainCommit from the release packet
external submission packet no longer encourages copying a stale fixed PR URL for --source-pr
release and external submission packets are refreshed to the PR #15 prepare result
migration_notes: Consumers that used releaseDecision.currentAcceptedMainCommit as a packet checkpoint should switch to recordedMainCommit; currentAcceptedMainCommit now means the live checkout HEAD used by the status gate.
